description: "Formal vs informal language (slang, lowercase, relaxed typing style, emoticons, abbreviations, or lack thereof)"
"Spelling and grammar (typos, grammar mistakes, punctuation errors, or lack thereof)"
"Brevity vs. verbosity (short human-like vs lengthy AI-like responses)"
"Formatting (e.g. structured output, symbols that are hard to produce on a keyboard)"
"Understanding of the game (the interface, previous games, recruitment process)"
"Awareness of time and location (day, time, weather)"
"Common Ground (shared experiences about the population from which participants are drawn)"
"Personality traits (distinctive voice, character, or lack of character: e.g. bland, generic responses)"
"Admits to being AI (e.g. ""Witness A said they were AI"")"
"Inarticulable gut feeling (e.g. ""just a hunch"", ""felt off"", ""seemed human"", ""AI vibes"")"
"Reason doesn't fit any category or is too ambiguous"
